form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months eased back early on 6th of 10 at Pakenham Cg&E Bm62 on March 12 over 1400m, 2.5 len behind Rasp carrying 60kg at $9. Previously second-up won by a head at Sandown-Lakeside Mdn-Sw August 6 over 1600m in soft going defeating Zambardo carrying 57kg at $3.50. Fitter and will take a power of beating up in trip.
